description_long: This house features a rectangular, two-story structure with a modern, utilitarian design, clad in gray brickwork. The facade is punctuated by numerous rectangular windows arranged in neat, symmetrical rows, allowing ample natural light into the interior. A prominent front entryway is accessed via a long, straight ramp flanked by planters, leading to a covered porch area with an orange-striped awning. The property includes a large deciduous tree and a paved outdoor seating area, enhancing its suburban appeal. The flat roof and clean lines emphasize a contemporary architectural style, while the visible interior spaces suggest open-plan living with wooden flooring and built-in shelving. The overall layout is practical, with clear separation between indoor and outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern, two-story house with gray brick walls, flat roof, and symmetrical windows, featuring a ramped entryway, covered porch, and a large tree in the front yard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the house's gray brick exterior, multiple windows, and a partial view of the interior layout with wooden floors and shelving.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entry ramp, covered porch with orange-striped awning, symmetrical window arrangement, and a large tree with a paved seating area.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the house's flat roof, more windows, and the outdoor area with the tree and seating space clearly visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the house with fewer windows, a balcony, and the tree positioned further from the structure.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a straight ramp, flanked by planters, leading to a covered porch with an orange-striped awning and double doors.
